reason: The remediation only edits the pam_pwquality configuration to set a minimum password length. This is a standard STIG hardening step, has minimal impact on system services, and does not affect boot or networking. As long as a reasonable length is chosen, the change will not lock out administrators.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Setting a length that is too high may cause user password creation failures; Existing passwords may not meet the new requirement until changed
